checks.description: A standard frontend project structure and dependency manifest exist in the repository root.
The documented development command starts the project locally or is otherwise verifiably runnable.
The homepage includes hero, about, projects, and contact coverage with usable navigation targets.
The layout remains usable on mobile and desktop widths without obvious blocking issues.
Semantic structure, keyboard reachability, and readable contrast are addressed at a basic level.
The %SystemDrive% directory was left untouched during Sprint S001.
